name: Cult Guard Post
description: Elite cultist guards block the passage to the deeper sanctum!

dungeon_level_3_complete.display_message: The cult guards fall. Beyond their post, stairs descend deeper into the sanctum. You can feel dark energy pulsing from below - you're getting close to the heart of their operation.

special_rules.description: Cult fanatics have bonus resistance to fear/charm effects

ambient_description: The chamber ahead serves as a guard post. Cult fanatics in ceremonial armor stand watch alongside regular cultists. Braziers burn with green flames, and ritual circles are carved into the floor. They've been waiting for intruders.
victory_description: The last cult fanatic falls with a curse on his lips. You search their bodies and find orders - 'Defend the sanctum. High Cultist Vexthar must not be disturbed during the final ritual.' The stairs beyond lead deeper, toward whatever horror they've been preparing.
defeat_description: The cult guards prove too strong. Wounded and desperate, you fall back to regroup. Their fanatical laughter echoes through the chamber as you retreat.
